claimText: NTU Health Policy and Management conduct rules allow AI tools according to teaching and research needs, but require users to clearly explain the content and scope of use, respect privacy, disclose assistance sources, verify AI output, and take responsibility for results.
normalizedValue: HPM conduct rules require disclosure, privacy respect, verification and responsibility for AI tool use
